in_flight: DONE + committed + pushed (cairn af7b195). THE CODE SPINE IS FOUNDED — the first class-space code ever cast. 'Tester next' resolved to its true dependency leaf: not BaseDevice but what BaseDevice AND BaseShim both compose — CoreValuesMixin, the frozen CP1-CP6 contract (base/core_values.py line 30-31 of core-values.md: 'you cannot be a device without them'). What landed: (1) pyproject.toml + cairn/ import root; cairn/__init__.py and cairn/base/__init__.py are EMPTY/lazy by the boot-order law (importing a subpackage must never eager-import a DB-bound one). (2) cairn/base/core_values.py — GRAFTED carried-over-intact from the quarry (UnseenUniversity/unseen_university/diagnostic_base/core_values.py) per Law 8 + Law 2 (the core values are the one part of the predecessor never the problem); re-provenanced for Cairn; the canonical WORDS stay in CairnCommons/intentions/core-values.md, this is the ENFORCED form. (3) cairn/base/intention+why.json — the base's charter (Law 5), matching the learning/ charter schema, including the mandatory how_it_learns field: it does NOT learn, by design — a ratified frozen contract is the terminal floor the system stands on; nothing-is-terminal does not reach the axioms. (4) cairn/base/proofs/test_core_values.py — the pin test, runnable BARE with python3 (self-bootstraps sys.path via parents[3]; NO pytest — pytest isn't installed and the tester device will own how proofs run later; matches the learning/gate_view.py hand-run convention). PROVEN: green from two cwds; the commons drift gate BIT (cross-checked code vs core-values.md whitespace-normalized, did not abstain); hollow-build falsification confirmed it goes RED on reorder, narrative-drift, and mutation (Law 8 — a proof a hollow build couldn't pass). .gitignore extended with Python cruft (__pycache__/.venv/egg-info — state, not code).
next_direction: THE SECOND GRAFT: BaseDevice + BaseShim (cairn/base/device.py + cairn/base/shim.py). This pair is what brings the COMPOSITION TEETH — the UU pin test's test_no_imported_device_or_shim_lacks_the_values / test_base_device_and_shim_inherit_the_mixin, which prove 'no device or shim can lack the values' (a property of BaseDevice/BaseShim, unprovable until they exist — filed as the open edge this session, NOT faked). Sources to pull from: UnseenUniversity/unseen_university/device.py + shim.py + diagnostic_base/base.py (Akien's open question from the report, UNANSWERED: pull the quarry sources first to see how much crosses intact vs needs redesign for Cairn — the Form v0 at MAP.md:157 is the contract they must satisfy: intention->state->settings introspection surface = Form #2). BaseShim also carries 'the one loop primitive' (MAP.md:327) — the single loop the whole state-machine runs in (PROVED/LEARNING are the two rests inside it, MAP.md:832). AFTER the base pair: the tester becomes the first real DEVICE on the spine (subclasses BaseDevice), owns the network, emits VALIDATIONS (MAP.md:569). Build order (MAP.md:888): ...CP/diagnostic base [IN PROGRESS] -> tester+kernel-owned-network -> db domain -> ground loop -> rack -> inference domain -> web server -> librarian -> graph trees.
